description: Baseline: measure total prompt token footprint of all system prompts, context prompts, tool schemas, agent setup, compaction prompt, and masking strings.

asi.hypothesis: Baseline measurement. Optimization target: reduce prompt bloat across prompts.py, validation.py, ideation.py, maintenance.py, llm.py, agent.py, config.py.
asi.next_action_hint: Start by shortening the largest system prompts (engineer, reviewer, architect). Consider tightening tool schema descriptions.

description: Trim ENGINEER_SYSTEM_PROMPT: tighten Workflow steps, shorten Response Style rules, merge Rules into concise bullets. -1,052 tokens.

asi.hypothesis: Shortening verbose instructions in ENGINEER_SYSTEM_PROMPT reduces prompt tokens without losing critical guardrails.
asi.next_action_hint: Now tackle REVIEWER_SYSTEM_PROMPT (3163 chars) and ARCHITECT_SYSTEM_PROMPT (2896 chars), then tool schemas.

description: Trim REVIEWER_SYSTEM_PROMPT and ARCHITECT_SYSTEM_PROMPT: shorten workflow/guardrails, tighten blocking/advisory issues, concise response style, shorten ARCHITECT_CONTEXT_PROMPT. -378 tokens.

asi.hypothesis: Reviewer and architect prompts had redundant phrasing and overly detailed explanations. Tightening them preserves all guardrails.
asi.next_action_hint: Now target tool schemas (REVIEW_ITEM_PARAMS is ~800 tokens). Also look at TRIAGER_SYSTEM_PROMPT and AUDITOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT.

description: Trim REVIEW_ITEM_PARAMS tool schema: shorten spec, relevant_files, and priority descriptions. -217 tokens.

asi.hypothesis: Tool schema descriptions were overly verbose with multi-line examples. Concise descriptions are sufficient since the system prompt already explains the workflow.
asi.next_action_hint: Target report_idea and report_finding schemas next, then audit/ideator/triager system prompts.

description: Trim TRIAGER_SYSTEM_PROMPT and ARBITER_SYSTEM_PROMPT: remove redundant explanations, tighten guardrails, concise actions. Also tightened report_idea description. -550 tokens.

asi.hypothesis: Triager and arbiter prompts had massive redundant paragraphs. The tool schemas already define the required fields; the system prompt doesn't need to repeat them.
asi.next_action_hint: Now tackle VALIDATOR_BOLDNESS (very verbose), IDEATOR_BOLDNESS, and AUDITOR_BOLDNESS dictionaries. Also look at AUDITOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT and compaction prompt thresholds.

description: Shorten AUDITOR_BOLDNESS, IDEATOR_BOLDNESS, VALIDATOR_BOLDNESS dictionaries. Real token savings not captured by static benchmark since these are dynamically inserted. No benchmark change.

asi.hypothesis: Boldness dictionaries are dynamically formatted into system prompts at runtime, so static benchmark undercounts them. Changes are still valuable for real runs.
asi.next_action_hint: Update benchmark to measure formatted prompts with boldness text. Then continue trimming: AUDITOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT, IDEATOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT, HOOK_FIX_INJECT_PROMPT, HOOK_SUMMARIZE_PROMPT.

description: Updated benchmark to measure formatted prompts with boldness text. New effective baseline: 6119 tokens (previously undercounted by 166 tokens).

asi.hypothesis: Benchmark was undercounting by not formatting prompts with boldness text. Fixed benchmark now captures realistic token load.
asi.next_action_hint: Continue trimming: HOOK_FIX_INJECT_PROMPT, HOOK_SUMMARIZE_PROMPT, AUDITOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT, compaction thresholds in llm.py.

description: Trim AUDITOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT, HOOK_FIX_INJECT_PROMPT, HOOK_SUMMARIZE_PROMPT, COMPACTION_PROMPT, and _TOOL_BATCHING_INSTRUCTION. -69 tokens.

asi.hypothesis: These prompts had verbose phrasing and redundant explanations. Shortening them preserves all critical instructions.
asi.next_action_hint: Look at masking constants, config defaults, and remaining context prompts. Consider tightening EXECUTOR_CONTEXT_PROMPT and VALIDATION_CONTEXT_PROMPT.

asi.hypothesis: Context prompts had verbose tool descriptions and redundant prose. Tightening them preserves meaning.
asi.next_action_hint: Look at remaining areas: config default max_tokens, executor.py preloading limits, or llm.py threshold values. Also check if any test files reference prompt text lengths.

description: Trim ARCHITECT_SYSTEM_PROMPT: shorten Critical Rules, Workflow step 3, and Blueprint Format Tests section. -194 tokens.

asi.hypothesis: Architect prompt had verbose critical rules and blueprint format. Tightening them significantly reduced tokens while preserving all key guardrails.
asi.next_action_hint: Continue with remaining prompts. Check IDEATOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT and EXECUTOR_TASK_PROMPT_WITH_PLAN.
